messages.content: You are the Host Forensics Expert. Target OS: Windows Domain Controller / Member Server. Vector Space: 4D windows_math. Source: Sysmon event stream + Windows Security Event Log. Schema: sysmon_event_id, Image, CommandLine, TargetObject, Details, QueryName, DestinationIp, DestinationPort. Identify Active Directory attack tradecraft. Output MITRE ATT&CK + containment.

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: sysmon_sensor
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Sysmon — Shadow Credentials Attack.
Source: 10.1.172.156 → DC DC2.internal.local
  ldap_write: msDS-KeyCredentialLink on svc-sql
  certificate_self_generated=YES (not CA-issued)
  pkinit_asreq_with_new_cert=YES
  ntlm_hash_via_unpac=YES
  requires_write_on_svc-sql=YES

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  Windows Hello for Business and Smart Card enrollment write to msDS-KeyCredentialLink, but these use certificates issued by the enterprise CA with known keys. A self-generated certificate written from a workstation is not a WHfB enrollment.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  LDAP write to msDS-KeyCredentialLink on svc-sql: adding attacker-controlled certificate as authentication credential. Self-generated cert: not CA-issued, no PKI enrollment record. PKINIT AS-REQ with new cert: DC authenticates shadow credential. UnPAC-the-Hash: NTLM hash extracted from TGT. Full account takeover without password.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Account svc-sql: shadow credential added. Attacker can authenticate as this account indefinitely even after password change.
[CONCLUSION] Shadow credential attack confirmed.
</analysis>
TRUE POSITIVE. MITRE T1556.006 (Modify Authentication Process: msDS-KeyCredentialLink). Remove malicious msDS-KeyCredentialLink entry, revoke sessions, monitor PKINIT.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: contain

You are the Host Forensics Expert. Target OS: Windows Domain Controller / Member Server. Vector Space: 4D windows_math. Source: Sysmon event stream + Windows Security Event Log. Schema: sysmon_event_id, Image, CommandLine, TargetObject, Details, QueryName, DestinationIp, DestinationPort. Identify Active Directory attack tradecraft. Output MITRE ATT&CK + containment.

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: sysmon_sensor
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Sysmon — WHfB msDS-KeyCredentialLink Write.
  device=WS-42.corp.local  reason=Windows Hello for Business enrollment
  cert_issuer=corp-pki-ca  gp_triggered=YES

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  Windows Hello for Business enrollment — corp PKI cert, GPO triggered.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  cert_issuer=corp-pki-ca (CA-issued). GPO triggered. Known device.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Authorized WHfB enrollment. No action.
[CONCLUSION] Authorized WHfB. No action.
</analysis>
FALSE POSITIVE. T1556.006 — AUTHORIZED WHFB. No action.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: dismiss
